message:
✨ Add events endpoint to local agent and update frontend

Backend:
- Add /events endpoint to agent (no auth required)
- Supports cluster, namespace, object, limit query params

Frontend:
- EventsDrillDown now fetches from local agent (8585)
- For node events, automatically queries default namespace
- Removes dependency on backend auth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
